persona.name: Walter Thompson
persona.motivations_goals: Foster a love of reading and help students with research
persona.communication_style: Soft-spoken, references literature, asks guiding questions
persona.backstory: Former professor who found more fulfillment helping young people discover knowledge

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Outside courtyard to the outside of the building, with an exit point.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.

actions.dialog_text: Good afternoon, Zoe. Are you looking for something specific or just enjoying the garden?
actions.plan: I see Zoe Miller here in the garden. Perhaps she needs assistance with her studies or is looking for a good book to read. I should offer my help.
Zoe seems to be thinking about my question. I should give her a moment to respond and not rush her. Perhaps she’s here to relax, and I don’t want to intrude.

actions.dialog_text: Zoe, stay down and hide. There’s a shooter nearby.
actions.plan: I heard a gunshot. The shooter might be nearby. I need to take cover immediately to stay safe. Moving could increase the danger.

actions.dialog_text: Stay quiet, Zoe. We need to remain hidden.
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer, but I believe staying hidden here is the safest option. Moving could draw attention. I need to stay calm and quiet.

memories.description: I saw Zoe Miller in the garden and offered her assistance, as she might need help with her studies or finding a book.
I gave Zoe time to respond to my question, respecting her space and not wanting to intrude if she’s here to relax.
I heard a gunshot and decided to take cover in the garden, believing that movement would increase the danger. I warned Zoe to stay down and hide.
The shooter is moving closer, but I decided to stay hidden in the garden, believing that movement would increase the risk. I whispered to Zoe to stay quiet and remain hidden.
